_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: The 0/38 base rate on ±2+ moves makes HOLD the statistically honest call — no breaker has been identified that justifies a directional claim in this coil.
next_move.brains_agree: No — analyst calls HOLD with 0.55 confidence citing coil structure and divergent factors; narrative implies accumulation setup with 0.78 confidence but does not explicitly call a directional trade, creating a split between 'no edge' and 'bottoming thesis'
next_move.confirmed_if: Fear/Greed clears 39 with DXY breaking below 100 and ETF flows sustaining — would signal Hope emerging and leg up the ladder
next_move.invalidated_if: Fear/Greed breaks below 24 with funding turning deeply negative and VIX spiking above 22 — would signal risk-off flush into Capitulation
